_publications._publicationTitle: Molecular Diagnosis of Neurofibromatosis by Multigene Panel Testing.

_contextSnippet: Fortunately, all of them were diagnosed clearly using multigene panel testing combined with Sanger sequencing. Multigene panel testing combined with Sanger sequencing was used to test five probands suspected of having NF.
details: Successfully identified NF1 and NF2 variants in all 5 probands with suspected NF using multigene panel testing, achieving 100% diagnostic success rate in this cohort
